---
id: list-containers
title: "List containers"
description: "List available containers (repositories, drives, spaces, etc.) for an installation. Use this to populate a resource picker UI for selecting which containers to index."
sidebar_label: "List containers"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: core/api_reference/sercha-core-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List containers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/installations/{id}/containers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List available containers (repositories, drives, spaces, etc.) for an installation. Use this to populate a resource picker UI for selecting which containers to index.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Installation ID","in":"path","name":"id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Pagination cursor from previous response","in":"query","name":"cursor","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Paginated list of containers available for indexing","properties":{"containers":{"description":"Containers is the list of available containers (repos, drives, spaces, etc.)","items":{"properties":{"description":{"description":"Description is an optional description of the container.","type":"string"},"id":{"description":"ID is the provider-specific identifier.\nFormat varies by provider:\n  - GitHub: \"owner/repo\"\n  - Google Drive: drive ID\n  - Confluence: space key","type":"string"},"metadata":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"string"},"description":"Metadata contains provider-specific additional data.\nExamples:\n  - GitHub: {\"owner\": \"...\", \"private\": \"true\", \"archived\": \"false\"}\n  - Google Drive: {\"shared\": \"true\"}","type":"object"},"name":{"description":"Name is the human-readable display name.","type":"string"},"type":{"description":"Type identifies the container type.\nExamples: \"repository\", \"shared_drive\", \"space\", \"project\", \"channel\"","type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"has_more":{"description":"HasMore indicates if there are more containers to fetch.","type":"boolean"},"next_cursor":{"description":"NextCursor is the cursor for the next page, empty if no more pages.","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Missing installation ID","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"404":{"description":"Installation not found","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
